## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content generation progress, sitemap issues, and content strategy for Boost My School.](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [9 articles regenerated, 6 new articles in progress; some technical delays but on track](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Sitemap issues to be resolved by Jan 1; manual indexing possible in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Content publishing strategy to be refined; spacing out 5-10 articles/week recommended](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Exploring content refresh opportunities for quick wins on existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Progress

  - [9 articles regenerated, focusing on image generation](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [6 new articles in progress, completing "options" cluster and moving to "reunions"](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Technical issues (Air ops errors) caused slight delays but are being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Sadira to review regenerated content throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

### Sitemap Resolution

  - [Fix for sitemap issues to be implemented by Jan 1, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Hudson can manually index articles published before the fix goes live](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [No concerns for immediate content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [Hudson to provide feedback on regenerated content within the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - List of competitor sites to avoid linking to be provided by Hudson (missed action item)

### Publishing Strategy

  - [Recommendation: Space out content publishing, 5-10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Hudson open to following best practices for posting schedule](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Possibility of publishing some articles during the holiday break (no issues anticipated)](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Refresh Exploration

  - [GrowthX proposes refreshing existing content for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Target: Pages ranking on SERP positions 2-4 for valuable keywords](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Hudson agrees to the experiment despite potential technical challenges with old blog system](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Andrej to prioritize this for January, leveraging SEO testing experience](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### SEO Testing Approach

  - [Batch cohort testing: Refresh content, upload to tool, measure uplift over time](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Iterative process to identify effective strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Potential for significant growth driver based on past experiences](https://fathom.video/share/nFgBaphu4j7Ku9YJzfMfQzGHHdhtxGwy?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
